title: phelypaea schultzii
intro: Phelypaea schultzii, also known as the purple Phelypaea or purple beardtongue, is a rare, flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. Research on this plant has found that it has medicinal properties due to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Phelypaea schultzii include its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may help to protect against cell damage and reduce the risk of certain diseases.
